title: Shield Breaker
description: Don't waste time in PvP. When your opponent raises their shield, Shield Breaker will think for you.
body:
<center>
  
![Shield Breaker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adad71fa69d384726e60d97cc2067778a28b6c19.png)
  
# 🚀 Shield Breaker

*Automatically swaps to your axe the moment you hit a shield, disabling enemy defenses instantly.*

<hr style="border: null; height: 1px; background-color: #3f3f46; margin: 20px 0;">

[![Fabric Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/FABRIC-LOADER-8b5cf6?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=18191c&logo=fabric&logoColor=8b5cf6)](https://fabricmc.net)
  
[![Client Side](https://img.shields.io/badge/SIDE-CLIENT%20SIDE-0ea5e9?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=18191c&logo=minecraft&logoColor=0ea5e9)](#)
  
[![Requires Fabric API](https://img.shields.io/badge/REQUIRES-FABRIC%20API-1ecc73?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=18191c&logo=modrinth&logoColor=1ecc73)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

</center>

<hr style="border: null; height: 1px; background-color: #3f3f46; margin: 20px 0;">

## 🌟 Key Features

A streamlined overview designed to show players exactly why they need your mod:

* **🪓 Instant Shield Breaker:** Automatically detects when an opponent is blocking with a shield. The moment you strike, it instantly swaps to the nearest axe in your hotbar to disable their defense, then seamlessly switches back to your weapon.
* **🎨 Modern GUI:** Press `Right CTRL` (Default) to open a clean, intuitive interface to easily manage your settings and toggle features without typing complex commands.
* **⚡ PvP-Optimized Response:** Built with client-side efficiency in mind, ensuring split-second weapon switches mid-combat with zero input lag or FPS drops.

<hr style="border: null; height: 1px; background-color: #3f3f46; margin: 20px 0;">

## 📖 How to Use

> 💡 **Quick Tip:** It is highly recommended to restart your game after the initial setup for all configurations to sync properly.

1. Launch Minecraft and press **Right CTRL** to bring up the main mod menu.
2. Toggle your preferred modules to **ENABLE** within the user-friendly interface.
3. Bind a custom hotkey (e.g., the `G` key) to quickly toggle the mod on and off mid-combat without opening the menu.

<hr style="border: null; height: 1px; background-color: #3f3f46; margin: 20px 0;">

<center>
